raw.official description: Disruptor Shot can stick to enemies and generates Railgun energy when dealing damage.
raw.ability details:
* '' Removed in Season 18.''
* The stuck target takes 50% reduced damage from Disruptor Shot.
** The final tick still deals full damage (potential bug), causing this to reduce the total damage from 280 to 148 instead of 140.
* 25% of the damage dealt is converted to Railgun energy. This is based on final damage after [[damage modification|modifications]].
** As a result, up to 70 energy can be generated from an enemy standing in the area for the full duration or 36 energy from a stuck target.

raw.official description: Enemies hit by Disruptor Shot are slowed by 25%.
raw.ability details: * Slow ends as soon as the target leaves the area.

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Power Slide gains an additional charge and its jump height shifts to lateral movement.
While sliding, Power Slide generates up to 75 Energy.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Railgun’s maximum energy is increased by 50 while Overclock is active.
raw.ability details: * Charging to 150% increases Railgun's alt fire max damage from 120 to 170 (255 for headshots).

raw.shot type: [[File:Swift_Step_Icon.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Movement ability|Movement ]] Movement
raw.official description: Ground slide that can cancel into a high jump.
raw.ability details:
* Sojourn can fire and use abilities while sliding and leaping.
* The initial slide part can be activated mid-air, but the jump cancel may only be used when Sojourn is on a walkable surface.
* Power Slide's [[movement speed]] buff does not count towards global movement speed buff cap.
* Destroys fences and other breakables in the way when sliding along ground, but not while leaping.

raw.official description: Launch an energy burst that deals damage to enemies within it.

raw.ability keywords: area of effect;;spherical::armor piercing::barrier collide::fixed::travel time
raw.ability details: * The projectile turns into a stationary AoE that deals periodic damage, upon colliding with an enemy [[hero]] or [[object]]. * The projectile is blocked by [[barrier]]s, turning into an AoE upon contact, but the AoE pierces barriers. * Periodic damage ignores damage reduction from [[armor]]. * The projectile can be destroyed by [[File:Ability-dva3.png|sub|link=D.Va#Defense Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[D.Va#Defense Matrix|Defense Matrix]], [[File:Abilities-sigma3.png|sub|link=Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Sigma#Kinetic Grasp|Kinetic Grasp]], [[File:Ability_JavelinSpin.png|sub|link=Orisa#Javelin Spin|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Orisa#Javelin Spin|Javelin Spin]], [[File:Perk_PowerMatrix.png|sub|link=Doomfist#Power Matrix|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Doomfist#Power Matrix|Power Matrix]] and [[File:ULT Kekkai Sancturary.png|sub|link=Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Mizuki#Kekkai Sanctuary|Kekkai Sanctuary]] and reflected by [[File:Ability-genji2.png|sub|link=Genji#Deflect|40x40px |class=inline-icon invert-image]] [[Genji#Deflect|Deflect]] before it lands and turns into an AoE.

abilities.name: Railgun

raw.official description: Rapid firing projectiles that generate energy on hit.
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 144 while firing (~100.93 overall w/reload)
* Each projectile hit generates 5 energy against [[heroes]] and 1 energy against [[objects]], such as [[barrier]]s and turrets.
** Critical hits against [[heroes]] grant 10 energy instead of 5.
** The amount of energy gained is unaffected by damage modifiers (amplifications, reductions).
* Maximum spread is reached after 12 shots.
* Spread is 2.5x more vertical than it is horizontal.

warnings: spread has multiple components and was left unparsed.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: High impact shot that consumes stored energy and pierces enemies.
raw.cast time: 0 + 0.64 seconds
raw.ability details:
* Can be charged up to a maximum of 100 energy but can be fired with at least 1 energy charge.
* Damage scales with the amount of stored energy.
* Damage increase is linear, with each point of energy increasing damage by 1.
* After 9 seconds without gaining energy, Sojourn's secondary fire energy will begin decaying at a rate of 15 per second.

raw.shot type: [[File:Icon-ability.tacticalvisor.png|40x40px|sub|class=inline-icon invert-image|link=Hitscan|Hitscan ]] Hitscan
raw.official description: Railgun energy auto-charges for a short duration.
raw.cast time: 0 + 0.74 seconds
raw.ability details:
* Damage per second: 120 (fired at max charge), 130.49 (fired immediately on recovery)
* Railgun starts charging immediately as Overclock is activated, but there is a short delay before it can be first fired.
